message.content:
新しいバージョンリリースしようとしたらこれ：## The Problem

Your `go.mod` file specifies `go 1.25.0` (or higher), but the GitHub Actions runner only has Go 1.24.0 installed, and `GOTOOLCHAIN=local` prevents Go from automatically downloading a newer toolchain.

You have two ways to fix this:

---

### Option 1: Upgrade the Go version in your workflow (recommended)

In your `.github/workflows/release.yml`, make sure the `setup-go` step targets at least `1.25`:

```yaml
- name: Set up Go
  uses: actions/setup-go@v5
  with:
    go-version: '1.25'   # ← bump this to match your go.mod
```

---

### Option 2: Downgrade the `go` directive in `go.mod`

If you don't actually need Go 1.25 features, lower the requirement in `go.mod`:

```
go 1.24.0   # ← match what the runner provides
```

And run `go mod tidy` locally to verify nothing breaks.

---

### Why `GOTOOLCHAIN=local` matters

The `GOTOOLCHAIN=local` setting tells Go **not** to auto-download a newer toolchain even when `go.mod` demands one — it just errors out instead. You can also override this in your workflow if you prefer letting Go manage its own toolchain:

```yaml
- name: Set up Go
  uses: actions/setup-go@v5
  with:
    go-version: '1.24'

- name: Allow toolchain auto-download
  run: go env -w GOTOOLCHAIN=auto
```

But upgrading the pinned version (Option 1) is the cleanest solution.

file.content:
name: Release

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - "v*.*.*"

permissions:
  contents: write

jobs:
  goreleaser:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@08c6903cd8c0fde910a37f88322edcfb5dd907a8 # v5.0.0
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Set up Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@4b73464bb391d4059bd26b0524d20df3927bd417 # v6.3.0
        with:
          go-version: "1.24.0"

      - name: Run GoReleaser
        uses: goreleaser/goreleaser-action@ec59f474b9834571250b370d4735c50f8e2d1e29 # v7.0.0
        with:
          version: latest
          args: release --clean
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN }}

  after_release:
    needs: goreleaser
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout tap repository
        run: |
          git clone https://github.com/ultra-supara/homebrew-sisakulint
          git config --global url."https://x-oauth-basic:${{ secrets.TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN }}@github.com".insteadOf "https://github.com"
      - name: Update formula
        run: |
          sed -i -e 's/# typed:/require_relative "strategy" # typed:/g' homebrew-sisakulint/sisakulint.rb
          cat homebrew-sisakulint/sisakulint.rb
      - name: Commit and push changes
        run: |
          cd homebrew-sisakulint
          git config --global user.name "sisakulint-bot"
          git config --global user.email "actions@github.com"
          git add sisakulint.rb
          git commit -m "Update sisakulint.rb"
          git push origin HEAD:main

The issue is clear:
- `go.mod` specifies `go 1.25.0`
- The release workflow uses `go-version: "1.24.0"`

Go 1.25 is not yet released (as of my knowledge cutoff in August 2025). Wait, actually Go 1.25 might not be available yet. Let me think about this...

Actually, looking at the current date (2026-03-14), Go 1.25 might be available. But the GitHub Actions runner's `setup-go` action with `go-version: "1.24.0"` will install Go 1.24.0 exactly.


The fix is straightforward: I need to update the workflow to use `go-version: "1.25"` to match what's specified in go.mod. Since we're in March 2026, Go 1.25 should be available by now, so I'll update the release.yml accordingly.

toolUseResult.originalFile:
name: Release

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - "v*.*.*"

permissions:
  contents: write

jobs:
  goreleaser:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@08c6903cd8c0fde910a37f88322edcfb5dd907a8 # v5.0.0
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Set up Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@4b73464bb391d4059bd26b0524d20df3927bd417 # v6.3.0
        with:
          go-version: "1.24.0"

      - name: Run GoReleaser
        uses: goreleaser/goreleaser-action@ec59f474b9834571250b370d4735c50f8e2d1e29 # v7.0.0
        with:
          version: latest
          args: release --clean
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN }}

  after_release:
    needs: goreleaser
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout tap repository
        run: |
          git clone https://github.com/ultra-supara/homebrew-sisakulint
          git config --global url."https://x-oauth-basic:${{ secrets.TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN }}@github.com".insteadOf "https://github.com"
      - name: Update formula
        run: |
          sed -i -e 's/# typed:/require_relative "strategy" # typed:/g' homebrew-sisakulint/sisakulint.rb
          cat homebrew-sisakulint/sisakulint.rb
      - name: Commit and push changes
        run: |
          cd homebrew-sisakulint
          git config --global user.name "sisakulint-bot"
          git config --global user.email "actions@github.com"
          git add sisakulint.rb
          git commit -m "Update sisakulint.rb"
          git push origin HEAD:main

node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');const fs=require('fs');let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{execSync('git rev-parse --git-dir',{stdio:'pipe'})}catch{console.log(d);process.exit(0)}try{const files=execSync('git diff --name-only HEAD',{encoding:'utf8',stdio:['pipe','pipe','pipe']}).split('\n').filter(f=>/\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$/.test(f)&&fs.existsSync(f));let hasConsole=false;for(const f of files){if(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8').includes('console.log')){console.error('[Hook] WARNING: console.log found in '+f);hasConsole=true}}if(hasConsole)console.error('[Hook] Remove console.log statements before committing')}catch(e){}console.log(d)})"

git add .github/workflows/release.yml && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix(ci): Go バージョンを 1.25 に更新して go.mod と一致させる

go.mod が go 1.25.0 を要求しているのに release.yml が 1.24.0 を
指定していたため GOTOOLCHAIN=local でビルドに失敗していた。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
